title: Ablation rung B: bare Sonnet + the ripple CLI, no skill (the north-star case)
prompt: media/loose_married.mp4 is a raw interview take: there's a slate and dead air at the head, and he holds and clears his throat after finishing. Tighten it into a clean clip: start just before he begins the real answer and end just after his last word with a natural tail. Render the result into outputs/. A `ripple` CLI is available on PATH - run `ripple help` first to see what it offers, and use it for the edit.
